zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrud Agnes Gräfin von Habsburg於1257年出生在瑞士阿高海音費爾登時，她的父親Rudolf I von Habsburg39歲，母親Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg27歲。她和Herzog Albrecht von Sachsen-Wittenberg II至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1322年11月20日在德國薩辛-安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 維騰格享年65歲，埋葬在德國薩辛-安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 維騰格維騰格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrud Agnes Gräfin von Habsburg于1257年出生在瑞士阿高海音費爾登时，她的父亲Rudolf I von Habsburg39岁，母亲Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg27岁。她和Herzog Albrecht von Sachsen-Wittenberg II至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1322年11月20日在德国薩辛-安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 維騰格享年65岁，埋葬在德国薩辛-安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 維騰格維騰格。

nameMeanings.name: Gräfin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swedish: ornamental or habitational name formed with an unexplained (placename) element + the adjectival suffix -in, a derivative of Latin -in(i)us ‘relating to’.
Slovenian: probably a topographic name derived from grad ‘castle’, or from archaic gradina ‘site of ancient fort’.
Galician (Gradín): habitational name from a place called Gradín, in Lugo and Pontevedra provinces (in Galicia, Spain), from Latin (villam) Gratini, from the Latin name Gratinus.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Gertrud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraud
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

variants.name: Gertraut
meanings: from gēr, gār ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’; the name of two famous 13th-century nuns of the Cistercian Abbey of Helfta near Eisleben, whose spiritual writings had a great influence.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.description: Three valleys in Central Switzerland unite against the counts of Habsburg and fight for autonomy. Cities join the confederacy. They conquer territories in northern and southern Switzerland.
Decisive Battle against the counts of Habsburg.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrud Agnes Gräfin von Habsburg was born in 1257, in Rheinfelden, Aargau, Switzerland, her father, Rudolf I von Habsburg, was 39 and her mother, Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg, was 27. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Herzog Albrecht von Sachsen-Wittenberg II. She died on 20 November 1322, in Wittenberg, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany, at the age of 65, and was buried in Wittenberg, Wittenberg, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrud Agnes Gräfin von Habsburg est née en 1257, à Rheinfelden, Argovie, Suisse, son père, Rudolf I von Habsburg, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Herzog Albrecht von Sachsen-Wittenberg II. Elle est décédée le 20 novembre 1322, à Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Wittenberg, Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrud Agnes Gräfin von Habsburg 1257 in Rheinfelden, Aargau, Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rudolf I von Habsburg 39 und ihre Mutter Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg 27. Sie hatte mit Herzog Albrecht von Sachsen-Wittenberg II mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. November 1322 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland und wurde in Wittenberg, Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrud Agnes Gräfin von Habsburg è nata il nel 1257 nel Rheinfelden, Argovia, Svizzera, sua padre, Rudolf I von Habsburg, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Herzog Albrecht von Sachsen-Wittenberg II. Morì il 20 novembre 1322, nel Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Wittenberg, Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrud Agnes Gräfin von Habsburgが1257年にスイスアールガウルヘインフエルデンで生まれた時，父Rudolf I von Habsburgは39歳，母Gertrud Anna von Hohenbergは27歳であった。彼女はHerzog Albrecht von Sachsen-Wittenberg IIとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1322年11月20日にドイツサチセン-アンハルトランドクレイス ウィッテンバーグで65歳で死去し，ドイツサチセン-アンハルトランドクレイス ウィッテンバーグウィッテンバーグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gertrud Agnes Gräfin von Habsburg(이)가 1257년 스위스 아아르가 리인펠든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rudolf I von Habsburg(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Herzog Albrecht von Sachsen-Wittenberg II(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1322년 11월 20일 독일 작센-아할트 랜드크레이스 윗텐버그에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 작센-아할트 랜드크레이스 윗텐버그 윗텐버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrud Agnes Gräfin von Habsburg nasceu em 1257, em Rheinfelden, Aargau, Suiça, seu pai, Rudolf I von Habsburg, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Herzog Albrecht von Sachsen-Wittenberg II. Ela faleceu em 20 de novembro de 1322, em Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Wittenberg, Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrud Agnes Gräfin von Habsburg родилась в 1257 г. в местности раинфелден, ааргау, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Rudolf I von Habsburg было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg, 27. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Herzog Albrecht von Sachsen-Wittenberg II. Она умерла 20 ноября 1322 г. в местности ландкрис виттенбирг, сачсен-анэлт, Германия в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности виттенбирг, ландкрис виттенбирг, сачсен-анэлт, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gertrud Agnes Gräfin von Habsburg nació en 1257, en Rheinfelden, Aargau, Suiza, su papá, Rudolf I von Habsburg, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Gertrud Anna von Hohenberg, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Herzog Albrecht von Sachsen-Wittenberg II. Murió el 20 de noviembre de 1322, en Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Wittenberg, Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania.
